briefdescription.para: Creates an uninitialized InputField handle.

detaileddescription.para: Only derived versions can be instantiated. Calling member functions with an uninitialized Dali::Object is not allowed.

briefdescription.para: Copy constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
Creates another handle that points to the same real object.
inputField
Handle to copy

briefdescription.para: Move constructor.
Virtual destructor.

detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods.

briefdescription.para: Copy assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
Changes this handle to point to another real object.
handle
Object to assign this to
Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Move assignment operator.
Sets the text.

parameterdescription.para: The text to display in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Gets the text.

simplesect.para: The text currently set on the inputField in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font family of the text.

parameterdescription.para: The requested font family to use.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font family of the text.

simplesect.para: The font family currently set on the inputField.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font size of the text.
Gets the font size of the text.

simplesect.para: The font size currently set on the inputField, in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of the text.
Gets the color of the text.

simplesect.para: The text color currently set on the inputField.

briefdescription.para: Sets the horizontal alignment of the text within the inputField.
Gets the horizontal text alignment.
Sets the vertical alignment of the text within the inputField.
Gets the vertical text alignment.
Sets the overflow mode.
Gets the overflow mode.
Sets the placeholder text displayed when the input field is empty.

parameterdescription.para: The placeholder text in UTF-8 encoding.

briefdescription.para: Gets the placeholder text.

simplesect.para: The placeholder text in UTF-8 encoding.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of the placeholder text.

parameterdescription.para: The placeholder text color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of the placeholder text.

simplesect.para: The placeholder text color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the placeholder text is shown when the input field has focus.

parameterdescription.para: True to show the placeholder text when focused, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the placeholder text is shown when the input field has focus.

simplesect.para: True if the placeholder text is shown when focused, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the width of the text cursor.
Gets the width of the text cursor.
Sets the color of the text cursor.

detaileddescription.para: This color is applied to both primary and secondary cursors when a split cursor is shown in bidirectional text.

parameterdescription.para: The cursor color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of the text cursor.

simplesect.para: The cursor color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the cursor should blink.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable cursor blinking, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the cursor is set to blink.

simplesect.para: True if cursor blinking is enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the time interval in seconds between cursor on and off states.

parameterdescription.para: The cursor blink interval in seconds.

briefdescription.para: Returns the time interval in seconds between cursor on and off states.

simplesect.para: The cursor blink interval in seconds.

briefdescription.para: Sets the cursor position.

detaileddescription.para: The position is specified as a character index in the current text.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para: The returned value is the character index in the current text.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether text selection is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable text selection, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether text selection is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if text selection is enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the highlight color of the selected text region.

parameterdescription.para: The selection highlight color as a UiColor).

briefdescription.para: Gets the highlight color of the selected text region.

simplesect.para: The selection highlight color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether text editing handles are enabled.

detaileddescription.para: Text editing handles include the cursor handle (shown below the insertion cursor) and the left/right selection handles (shown at both ends of the selected text range).

parameterdescription.para: True to enable text editing handles, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether text editing handles are enabled.

simplesect.para: True if text editing handles are enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of the text editing handles.

detaileddescription.para: This color is applied to both the cursor handle and the left/right selection handles.

parameterdescription.para: The text editing handle color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of the text editing handles.

simplesect.para: The text editing handle color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets the cursor handle image.

detaileddescription.para: The cursor handle is shown below the insertion cursor when there is no selection range.

briefdescription.para: Gets the cursor handle image.
Sets the pressed cursor handle image.

detaileddescription.para: The cursor handle is shown below the insertion cursor when there is no selection range.

parameterdescription.para: The pressed cursor handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Gets the pressed cursor handle image.

simplesect.para: The pressed cursor handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Sets the left selection handle image.

detaileddescription.para: The selection handle is shown at the left bound of the selected text range.

parameterdescription.para: The left selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Gets the left selection handle image.

simplesect.para: The left selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Sets the right selection handle image.

detaileddescription.para: The selection handle is shown at the right bound of the selected text range.

parameterdescription.para: The right selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Gets the right selection handle image.

simplesect.para: The right selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Sets the pressed left selection handle image.

detaileddescription.para: The selection handle is shown at the left bound of the selected text range.

parameterdescription.para: The pressed left selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Gets the pressed left selection handle image.

simplesect.para: The pressed left selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Sets the pressed right selection handle image.

detaileddescription.para: The selection handle is shown at the right bound of the selected text range.

parameterdescription.para: The pressed right selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Gets the pressed right selection handle image.

simplesect.para: The pressed right selection handle image URL.

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum number of characters that can be entered into the InputField.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum number of characters allowed.

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum number of characters allowed in the InputField.
Sets the input filter.

detaileddescription.para: The input filter defines allow and deny patterns used to filter text before it is inserted.
If an allow pattern is set, input that does not match the pattern is rejected. If a deny pattern is set, input that matches the pattern is rejected.
If both patterns are set, input must match the allow pattern and must not match the deny pattern.

simplesect.para: This filter is applied to inserted input, such as user input, input method commits, and paste operations. It is not applied when text is set directly with SetText().

briefdescription.para: Clears the input filter.

detaileddescription.para: After clearing the input filter, all input is allowed unless another input filter is set.

briefdescription.para: Sets the password display mode.

listitem.para: PasswordMode::NONE: Password masking is not used. The input text is displayed as-is.
PasswordMode::HIDE_ALL: All input characters are displayed using the password mask character.
PasswordMode::REVEAL_LAST_CHARACTER: The last entered character is briefly displayed for the password reveal duration, then replaced with the password mask character.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current password display mode.
Sets the password mask character as a Unicode code point.

detaileddescription.para: This character is used to mask the password text when PasswordMode is HIDE_ALL or REVEAL_LAST_CHARACTER.

The parameter is a Unicode code point. For example:
'*' is U+002A (0x2A)
'•' is U+2022 (0x2022)

simplesect.para: Although the parameter type is uint32_t, only valid Unicode code points should be used. When setting this property via the property system, Property::INTEGER is used, so only code points within the int range can be safely passed through the property system.

parameterdescription.para: The Unicode code point of the password mask character.

briefdescription.para: Gets the password mask character as a Unicode code point.

simplesect.para: The Unicode code point of the password mask character.

briefdescription.para: Sets the password reveal duration in milliseconds.

detaileddescription.para: This value is used when PasswordMode is REVEAL_LAST_CHARACTER to determine how long the last entered character remains visible before being masked.
A duration of 0 means the character is immediately masked.

parameterdescription.para: The password reveal duration in milliseconds.

briefdescription.para: Gets the password reveal duration in milliseconds.

simplesect.para: The password reveal duration in milliseconds.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the InputField can be edited by user interaction.

parameterdescription.para: True to allow editing, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the InputField can be edited by user interaction.

simplesect.para: True if the InputField is editable, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets how the layout direction of the text is resolved.

listitem.para: LayoutDirectionMode::CONTENTS: The layout direction is determined from the text content itself.
LayoutDirectionMode::INHERIT: The layout direction is inherited from the parent view.
LayoutDirectionMode::LOCALE: The layout direction is determined based on the system locale.

simplesect.para: The default layout direction mode of InputField is LayoutDirectionMode::INHERIT.

parameterdescription.para: The LayoutDirectionMode used to determine the text layout direction.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current layout direction mode.

simplesect.para: The LayoutDirectionMode used to resolve the text layout direction.

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables mark-up processing for the input text.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, markup tags in the input text are interpreted and rendered accordingly. When disabled, the input text is treated as plain text.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable mark-up parsing, false to render text as plain string.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether mark-up processing is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if mark-up parsing is enabled, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font weight.
Returns the font weight.
Sets the font width.
Returns the font width.
Sets the font slant.
Returns the font slant.
Sets the background color behind the text.

detaileddescription.para: The background is rendered behind the glyphs of the text.

briefdescription.para: Gets the background color behind the text.
Clears the text background color.

detaileddescription.para: Disables the text background and removes the previously set color.

briefdescription.para: Sets the underline style.
Clears the underline style.
Sets the shadow style.
Clears the shadow style.
Sets the outline style.
Clears the outline style.
Sets the line-through style.
Clears the line-through style.
Sets the font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: The scaled font size is calculated from the current font size multiplied by this scale value.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font size scale.
Sets the minimum font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: If this value is greater than the maximum font size scale, the adjusted font size scale follows this minimum value.

briefdescription.para: Gets the minimum font size scale.
Sets the maximum font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: If this value is less than the minimum font size scale, the adjusted font size scale follows the minimum font size scale.

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum font size scale.
Sets whether the system font size scale is applied.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the system font size scale is used instead of the user-defined font size scale before applying the minimum and maximum constraints.

parameterdescription.para: True to apply the system font size scale, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the system font size scale is applied.

simplesect.para: True if the system font size scale is applied, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Sets the text color used for typing.

detaileddescription.para: If a text range is selected, the color is applied to the selected text. If the selection is collapsed, the color is applied to text inserted after the current cursor position.

briefdescription.para: Gets the text color used for typing.
Sets the font family used for typing.

detaileddescription.para: If a text range is selected, the font family is applied to the selected text. If the selection is collapsed, the font family is applied to text inserted after the current cursor position.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font family used for typing.
Sets the font size in pixels used for typing.

detaileddescription.para: If a text range is selected, the font size is applied to the selected text. If the selection is collapsed, the font size is applied to text inserted after the current cursor position.

parameterdescription.para: The typing font size in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font size in pixels used for typing.

simplesect.para: The typing font size in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font weight used for typing.

detaileddescription.para: If a text range is selected, the font weight is applied to the selected text. If the selection is collapsed, the font weight is applied to text inserted after the current cursor position.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font weight used for typing.
Sets the font width used for typing.

detaileddescription.para: If a text range is selected, the font width is applied to the selected text. If the selection is collapsed, the font width is applied to text inserted after the current cursor position.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font width used for typing.
Sets the font slant used for typing.

detaileddescription.para: If a text range is selected, the font slant is applied to the selected text. If the selection is collapsed, the font slant is applied to text inserted after the current cursor position.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font slant used for typing.
Sets the font variation axes.

detaileddescription.para: This replaces all previously set font variation axes.
If duplicate axis tags are provided, the last value is used.
Unsupported axis tags may be ignored depending on the selected font.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font variation from a settings string.

detaileddescription.para: The settings string consists of one or more pairs of axis tags and numeric values separated by commas.

Supported formats include:
wght=700,wdth=90 (recommended)
"wght" 700, "wdth" 90
'wght' 700, 'wdth' 90
In quoted formats, the axis tag must be wrapped with single quotes (U+0027) or double quotes (U+0022).
Each axis tag must contain exactly four printable ASCII characters in the range U+0020..U+007E. Space is allowed only as trailing characters in the axis tag.
If duplicate axis tags are specified, the last value is used.
If the input string is invalid, the font variation is not changed.
Unsupported axis tags may be ignored depending on the selected font.

briefdescription.para: Returns the font variation axes.
Clears the font variation.

detaileddescription.para: This removes all previously set font variation axes.

briefdescription.para: Gets the adjusted font size scale used for rendering.

detaileddescription.para: The adjusted font size scale is resolved after applying the current minimum and maximum font size scale constraints and, if enabled, the system font size scale.
If the minimum font size scale is greater than the maximum font size scale, the minimum font size scale takes precedence and is used as the adjusted scale.

simplesect.para: The adjusted font size scale used for rendering.

briefdescription.para: Gets the currently selected text.

simplesect.para: The selected text in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Gets the start index of the currently selected text.

simplesect.para: The start index of the selected text.

briefdescription.para: Gets the end index of the currently selected text.

simplesect.para: The end index of the selected text.

briefdescription.para: Selects the text within the specified index range.

parameterdescription.para: The start index of the selection.
The end index of the selection.

briefdescription.para: Selects the whole text.
Clears the current selection.
This signal is emitted when the text content changes.
This signal is emitted when the text input reaches the maximum allowed length.

detaileddescription.para: The signal is triggered when an attempt is made to insert additional characters beyond the configured maximum length.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when input is rejected by the input filter.

detaileddescription.para: The signal is triggered when an attempt is made to insert text that does not match the allow pattern, or matches the deny pattern.
The reason indicates whether the input did not match the allow pattern, or matched the deny pattern.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the cursor position changes.

parameterdescription.para: The view whose cursor position changed.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when text selection starts.
This signal is emitted when the text selection changes.
This signal is emitted when the text selection is cleared.
This signal is emitted when the current typing style changes.

detaileddescription.para: The signal is emitted when the typing style attributes resolved at the current cursor position or selected text range change, for example after cursor movement or selection changes.
The mask indicates which typing style attributes changed.

simplesect.para: This signal is intended to notify changes detected from the current cursor position or selection, not to mirror every SetTyping*() API call.

briefdescription.para: Creates an initialized InputField.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to InputField handle.

detaileddescription.para: If handle points to a InputField, the downcast produces valid handle. If not, the returned handle is left uninitialized.

simplesect.para: A handle to a InputField or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: InputField is a single-line editable text view.

detaileddescription.para: It supports user interaction for text input and editing, and handles text layout and rendering.
